title.underBigWelcome: Start by making yourself an account here!

divider.or: or use a third party service

name.label: Name
name.helper: The name you will enter the website with. Required.

email.label: E-mail
email.helper: The E-mail will be used everytime you enter the website. Required.

password.label: E-mail password
password.helper: The password will be used everytime you enter the website with the E-mail above. Required. The white spaces in the start and the end of the password will be trimmed.

repassword.label: Re-type password
repassword.helper: Repeat the password you wrote above. Required.

signup.createdAccountMessage: Account created successfully! please verify your E-mail via the link we sent you!

verification.failure: E-mail verification failed. Please request another one.
verification.sucess: E-mail verification Succeed. Please log in.

error.general: An error occured, please try later.

email.nameTooShort: The provided name must be at least three characters long.
email.emailNotProvided: You must provide your E-mail address.
email.emailNotValid: Your E-mail is not valid. Please provide a valid one.
email.passwordNotProvided: You must provide the E-mail password.
email.passwordTooLong: Your password is way too long. it must be 100 characters max.
email.passwordTooShort: Your password is way too short. it must be 8 characters min.
email.passwordWeak: Your password is weak. It must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one number and one special character.
email.repasswordNotProvided: You must fill the password repeating field.
email.passwordsDontMatch: The password and it's repeat must match but it isn't.
email.noToken: Please complete the captcha (or wait for the page to load)
email.tokenInvalid: Please complete the captcha (or wait for the page to load)
email.emailVerificationFailed: Sending an E-mail verification failed. Please contact the support.

supabase_createUser.anonymous_provider_disabled: We do not support anonymous signups.
supabase_createUser.bad_code_verifier: Error implementing client side code. Please contact support.
supabase_createUser.bad_json: Bad request was sent to the server. Please contact support.
supabase_createUser.bad_jwt: Bad tokens were sent to the server. Please contact support.
supabase_createUser.bad_oauth_callback: Bad OAuth implementation. Please contact support.
supabase_createUser.bad_oauth_state: Bad OAuth implementation. Please contact support.
supabase_createUser.captcha_failed: Please complete the Captcha to sign up.
supabase_createUser.conflict: Too many requests. Please slow down and try again.
supabase_createUser.email_address_invalid: This email address is not supported. Please use a different one.
supabase_createUser.email_address_not_authorized: We're currently setting up our email system. Please check back in a few minutes or contact support.
supabase_createUser.email_conflict_identity_not_deletable: This email is already linked to another account. Please contact support to merge your accounts.
supabase_createUser.email_exists: This email already exists. Please login or use a different email.
supabase_createUser.email_not_confirmed: This email needs verification. Please check your inbox!
supabase_createUser.flow_state_expired: Your session expired. Please sign up again.
supabase_createUser.flow_state_not_found: Your session expired. Please sign up again.
supabase_createUser.hook_payload_invalid_content_type: Invalid data type was sent to the server.
supabase_createUser.hook_payload_over_size_limit: Data is too large to process.
supabase_createUser.hook_timeout: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again in a few moments.
supabase_createUser.hook_timeout_after_retry: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again in a few moments.
supabase_createUser.identity_already_exists: This account is already linked to another user. Please sign in with a different account.
supabase_createUser.identity_not_found: This account is no longer available. Please sign in again.
supabase_createUser.insufficient_aal: For security, please complete two-factor authentication to continue.
supabase_createUser.invalid_credentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
supabase_createUser.invite_not_found: This invite has expired or already been used.
supabase_createUser.manual_linking_disabled: Account linking is currently unavailable. Please contact support.
supabase_createUser.mfa_challenge_expired: The security verification has expired. Please request a new verification code.

supabase_createUser.mfa_totp_already_enabled: Two-factor authentication is already enabled for this account.
supabase_createUser.mfa_totp_code_invalid: Invalid verification code. Please check and try again.
supabase_createUser.mfa_totp_enroll_not_enabled: Two-factor authentication setup is currently disabled.

supabase_createUser.mfa_totp_verify_not_enabled: Two-factor authentication verification is currently disabled.
supabase_createUser.mfa_verification_failed: The verification code is incorrect. Please try again.
supabase_createUser.mfa_verification_rejected: Security verification was rejected. Please try again.
supabase_createUser.mfa_verified_factor_exists: A verified phone factor already exists. Please remove it first.
supabase_createUser.mfa_web_authn_enroll_not_enabled: Security key enrollment is currently disabled.
supabase_createUser.mfa_web_authn_verify_not_enabled: Security key verification is currently disabled.
supabase_createUser.not_admin: You do not have permission to perform this action.
supabase_createUser.oauth_provider_not_supported: This login provider is not supported.
supabase_createUser.otp_disabled: One-time password login is currently disabled.
supabase_createUser.otp_expired: The verification code has expired. Please request a new one.
supabase_createUser.over_email_send_rate_limit: Too many emails sent. Please wait a while before trying again.
supabase_createUser.over_request_rate_limit: Too many requests. Please wait a few minutes and try again.

supabase_createUser.phone_not_confirmed: This phone number needs verification. Please check your messages.
supabase_createUser.phone_provider_disabled: Phone number signups are currently disabled.

supabase_createUser.provider_email_needs_verification: Please check your email to verify your account.
supabase_createUser.reauthentication_needed: For security, please reauthenticate to continue.
supabase_createUser.reauthentication_not_valid: The reauthentication code is incorrect. Please try again.

supabase_createUser.refresh_token_not_found: Session not found. Please log in again.
supabase_createUser.request_timeout: The request took too long. Please try again.

supabase_createUser.saml_relay_state_not_found: Your login session expired. Please try again.

supabase_createUser.single_identity_not_deletable: Cannot remove your only login method. Please add another one first.

supabase_createUser.sso_provider_not_found: Login provider not found. Please try again.
